title: Emails through Monday

posts.author: Steven1 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

Our team is interested in taking advantage of the ‘Emails & Activities’ integration. However, we currently don’t use Outlook or Gmail for our emails.

We’re seeking assistance to still use (an integration like) ‘Emails & Activities,’ whether by connecting our emails to a Gmail/Outlook account, using Zapier, or exploring other options.

Looking forward to your response!

Best regards,
Steven

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Steven1 , it seems like the emails and activities features work only with Gmail and outlook at the moment. There are other ways to potentially do some basic integration, but you won’t be able to get all the features, specially the filteration based on the task name.

Your best shot would be to do an email migration to gmail to fully utilize this feature.

In case you need any help setting it up let me know here and I’ll be happy to assist.

Zaki
Business Workflow Consultant
Ready Logic

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Steven1!

Thanks for reaching out to the community! There are several ways to automatically send and receive emails through monday.com. However, integrations allow you to utilize some incredible email hosts. If you’re an active user of Gmail/Outlook and you’d like to exchange emails based on board actions, then using third-party integrations is the right choice! This approach works well if you would like to gather emails received to your email address and automatically change them into board items on monday.com.

If you’re looking to implement custom email integrations, hire monday.com integrations experts from a recognized service provider. These experts will help keep your email communication centralized and tracking the details of every interaction easier.
